title: Summer Days in the Joyful Countryside
description:
Every summer, your sister's three daughters get to be a bit too much for her, so she sends them to your country home, where life is different from the big city. No one lives nearby, and there's nothing to do but relax.

Some of the activities will be fun, like karaoke, while other tasks are tougher, like gardening or working together on creating manga.

Spend time with all of the sisters to reach the finale, when the sisters go home.

Spend Time with Each Sister

Have a Fulfilling Summer Vacation
description_short: Welcome your nieces to your rural home to help them enjoy a summer vacation of relaxation, farming, and gaming!
